name: WhatsApp Restaurant Bot Pro 10/10 - UPI Version

parameters.query: SELECT * FROM user_sessions WHERE phone = '{{ $json.from }}' ORDER BY last_seen DESC LIMIT 1

INSERT INTO user_sessions (phone, table_number, cart, customer_name, last_seen, preferences, session_started)
VALUES ('{{ $json.session.phone }}', '{{ $json.session.table }}', '{{ JSON.stringify($json.session.cart) }}', '{{ $json.session.customer_name }}', NOW(), '{{ JSON.stringify($json.session.preferences) }}', NOW())
ON CONFLICT (phone) 
DO UPDATE SET 
  table_number = EXCLUDED.table_number,
  cart = EXCLUDED.cart,
  last_seen = EXCLUDED.last_seen,
  customer_name = EXCLUDED.customer_name
RETURNING *

SELECT code, name, category, price, description, allergens, is_available, image_url, popularity_score
FROM menu_items 
WHERE is_available = true 
ORDER BY category, code

SELECT code, name, category, price, description, popularity_score
FROM menu_items 
WHERE is_available = true 
ORDER BY popularity_score DESC 
LIMIT 10

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "messaging_product": "whatsapp",
  "to": "{{ $json.from }}",
  "type": "text",
  "text": {
    "body": "❓ *Help & Commands*
━━━━━━━━━━

📋 *Ordering:*
• Type MENU - View full menu
• Type POPULAR - Top items
• Send codes: B1 2 F3 1
  (2x item B1, 1x item F3)

🛒 *Cart:*
• Type CART - View cart
• Type REMOVE B1 - Remove item
• Type CLEAR - Clear cart
• Type CONFIRM - Place order

📊 *Account:*
• Type HISTORY - Past orders
• Type STATUS - Current order

💡 *Payment:*
• After confirming, scan UPI QR
• Type PAID after payment

📞 *Support:*
Call: {{ $env.SUPPORT_PHONE || '+91-1234567890' }}
Email: {{ $env.SUPPORT_EMAIL || 'support@restaurant.com' }}"
  }
}

parameters.query:
SELECT code, name, price, category, is_available 
FROM menu_items 
WHERE code = ANY(ARRAY['{{ $json.parsed_items.map(i => i.code).join("','") }}']) 
AND is_available = true

UPDATE user_sessions 
SET cart = '{{ JSON.stringify($json.session.cart) }}', 
    last_seen = NOW() 
WHERE phone = '{{ $json.from }}'
RETURNING *

INSERT INTO orders (order_id, table_number, phone, customer_name, items, subtotal, tax, total, status, upi_string, created_at)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.order.order_id }}',
  '{{ $json.order.table }}',
  '{{ $json.from }}',
  '{{ $json.order.customer_name }}',
  '{{ JSON.stringify($json.order.items) }}',
  {{ $json.order.subtotal }},
  {{ $json.order.tax }},
  {{ $json.order.total }},
  'pending_payment',
  '{{ $json.upi_string }}',
  NOW()
)
RETURNING *

UPDATE user_sessions 
SET cart = '[]', 
    total_orders = total_orders + 1,
    last_seen = NOW() 
WHERE phone = '{{ $json.from }}'
RETURNING *

SELECT order_id, table_number, total, status, phone, customer_name
FROM orders 
WHERE phone = '{{ $json.from }}' 
AND status = 'pending_payment'
ORDER BY created_at DESC 
LIMIT 1

UPDATE orders 
SET status = 'paid',
    paid_at = NOW(),
    estimated_time = 20
WHERE order_id = '{{ $json.pending_order.order_id }}'
RETURNING *

parameters.name: Body

parameters.query:
UPDATE orders 
SET status = 'preparing'
WHERE order_id = '{{ $json.order_id }}'
RETURNING *

UPDATE user_sessions 
SET cart = '[]', 
    last_seen = NOW() 
WHERE phone = '{{ $json.from }}'
RETURNING *

SELECT order_id, table_number, total, status, created_at, estimated_time
FROM orders 
WHERE phone = '{{ $json.from }}' 
ORDER BY created_at DESC 
LIMIT 1

SELECT order_id, table_number, total, status, created_at
FROM orders 
WHERE phone = '{{ $json.from }}' 
ORDER BY created_at DESC 
LIMIT 5

UPDATE user_sessions 
SET cart = '{{ JSON.stringify($json.session.cart) }}', 
    last_seen = NOW() 
WHERE phone = '{{ $json.from }}'
RETURNING *
